content: I work for the Mehtas since 2019. On the night of the murder, I left at 8:30 PM. I saw Priya Ma’am leave at 9:45 PM in her SUV. She said she was going to a friend’s house. I didn’t see anyone else come or go. I heard no screams. I cleaned the kitchen before leaving. The knife was in the drawer as always. I don’t know about the money or the land. I am just a worker. I don’t want trouble.
